assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_016",
  "safe": false,
  "verdict_reason": "The script overwrites existing pam_faillock.so entries and hard‑codes deny/unlock values, may create a malformed custom authselect profile, and switches to it without a backup or rollback plan. This can lock out all local and remote logins (including SSH) and interrupt services that rely on PAM.",
  "side_effects": [
    "Potential lockout of all users, including root, if the new authselect profile is incorrect",
    "Removal of existing custom pam_faillock options or comments",
    "Hard‑coded deny=5 and unlock_time=900 may not match policy requirements",
    "No backup of original authselect profile, making rollback difficult"
  ],
  "services_affected": [
    "sshd",
    "login",
    "sudo",
    "su",
    "cron",
    "systemd services using PAM"
  ],
  "recommendation": "Rollback"
}
